title: Advanced Cheese and more
description: "Anvanced Cheese and More" is a Minecraft mod that introduces a variety of new cheeses and playful mice to the game. Craft different types of cheese, encounter delightful mice, and add a cheesy twist to your Minecraft adventures.
body:
# Advanced Cheese and More (a.k.a. ACAM)
"Advanced Cheese and More" is a Minecraft mod that introduces a variety of new cheeses and playful mice to the game. Craft different types of cheese, encounter delightful mice, and add a cheesy twist to your Minecraft adventures. This mod focuses on adding lots of new items while staying true to the vanilla style.

## Build battle video
Watch the devs doing a build battle with this mod here: _[https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=nwSf-0VcOq8](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=nwSf-0VcOq8)_

## Features
- Different kinds of cheese: Normal cheese, Old cheese and Goat cheese.
- Mice: Spawn when cheese turns into old cheese.
- Slicing cheese: Slice cheese with a cheese slicer which functions as a more efficient way to get slices of cheese instead of the crafting table.
- Placable milk buckets: Place down your different kinds of milk buckets with gorgeous 3d Models.
- Toast and sandwiches with cheese: Craft these delicious foods with a crafting table.

  _And of course there's a bunch more for you to discover_
